title: Cobblemon Poke Odyssey
description: This mod pack contains all the required mods in order to play on the Poke Odyssey Cobblemon Server.
body:
![Webbanner for modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a8662f2c025b40ef945ce712cea1b8c7d2c6a1d.png)
This modpack includes all the essential mods needed to play on the PokéOdyssey Cobblemon Server. PokéOdyssey is a carefully curated pack that highlights the best Pokémon experience through Cobblemon. ![divider bar gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebc36f5132748adfd7ae3c5d3e12c055395bc839.png) Exploration & Building: Discover new worlds, build your dream base, and explore various biomes. Collect & Craft: Hundreds of custom items and gear to level up your adventure! Endless Cobblemon: Enjoy an abundant Cobblemon experience with a completed pokedex, and dozens of new custom pokemon that blend perfectly into the world. ![a promo image for gameplay features on the pokeodyssey server.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfd40ba7c3c7073f56182bb5e8c2ae00ae8a4026.png) - And much more, Join today! - ![divider bar purple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fa164a279cf88ad02a9ebe8a89012ee6eb9ed53.png) Performance PokéOdyssey is optimized to run on both low-end and high-end machines. Minimum Recommended RAM: 4GB Best Performance: 5-6GB allocated to Minecraft ![divider bar gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebc36f5132748adfd7ae3c5d3e12c055395bc839.png) ~ How to Play ~ Install the Modrinth Launcher: [Download here](https://modrinth.com/app) Allocate Sufficient RAM to Minecraft for smooth gameplay. Search for "PokeOdyssey" in the modpacks section and install. Join the Adventure! Dive into the server and explore the modpack’s offerings. ![a photo of pokeodyssey spawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68c226d836f0157f9fda1b0d2f11153c9ae6af05.png) ![divider bar purple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fa164a279cf88ad02a9ebe8a89012ee6eb9ed53.png) Support and Community Join our Discord: [PokéOdyssey Discord](https://discord.gg/pokeodyssey) Cobblemon Support: This modpack uses the Cobblemon mod, but we don’t own or maintain it. For issues with Cobblemon, visit their [Discord here](https://discord.gg/cobblemon). Note: This pack is intended primarily for the PokéOdyssey Server. It is not the official Cobblemon server and is not affiliated with the Cobblemon team.
